rubric.label: Lacks Discipline
rubric.description: Works only when told, no self-initiative

rubric.label: Motivated but Directionless
rubric.description: Enthusiasm + confusion: wants to help but doesn't know where to start

rubric.label: Consistent Performer
rubric.description: Reliable task execution: Does what I ask, meets standards

rubric.label: Reliable and Productive
rubric.description: High trust: I give him a task and forget about it. It gets done.

rubric.label: Problem Identifier
rubric.description: Spots patterns: identifies problems the supervisor hadn't asked about

rubric.label: Problem Solver
rubric.description: Identifies AND fixes: built a tracking system or SOP

rubric.label: Innovative and Experimental
rubric.description: Builds new tools/processes, tests approaches, creates MVPs

rubric.label: Exceptional Performer
rubric.description: Everything at 9 flawlessly, and others learn from their work
